testcase.name: test_apk_add_ucert

failure.message: labgrid.driver.exception.ExecutionError: ('apk add ucert', [], ['wgetFailed to send request: Operation not permitted', 'ERROR: wget: exited with error 4', 'WARNING: updating and opening https://downloads.openwrt.org/snapshots/packages/aarch64_generic/base/packages.adb: unexpected end of file', 'ERROR: unable to select packages:', ' ucert (no such package):', ' required by: world[ucert]'])

testcase.failure:
self = <test_apk.TestApk object at 0x7f1974dd2490> ssh_command = SSHDriver(target=Target(name='main', env=Environment(config_file='targets/qemu_armsr-armv8.yaml')), name=None, state=<...derr_merge=False, connection_timeout=120.0, explicit_sftp_mode=False, explicit_scp_mode=True, username='', password='')
@pytest.mark.skipif( os.getenv("LG_FEATURE_ONLINE") is None, reason="LG_FEATURE_ONLINE not defined" ) def test_apk_add_ucert(self, ssh_command): try: > ssh_command.run_check("apk add ucert")

self = SSHDriver(target=Target(name='main', env=Environment(config_file='targets/qemu_armsr-armv8.yaml')), name=None, state=<...derr_merge=False, connection_timeout=120.0, explicit_sftp_mode=False, explicit_scp_mode=True, username='', password='') cmd = 'apk add ucert'
def _run_check(self, cmd: str, *, timeout=30, codec: str = "utf-8", decodeerrors: str = "strict"): """ Internal function which runs the specified command on the shell and returns the output if successful, raises ExecutionError otherwise.
Args: cmd (str): command to run on the shell
Returns: List[str]: stdout of the executed command """ stdout, stderr, exitcode = self._run(cmd, timeout=timeout, codec=codec, decodeerrors=decodeerrors) if exitcode != 0: > raise ExecutionError(cmd, stdout, stderr) E labgrid.driver.exception.ExecutionError: ('apk add ucert', [], ['wgetFailed to send request: Operation not permitted', 'ERROR: wget: exited with error 4', 'WARNING: updating and opening https://downloads.openwrt.org/snapshots/packages/aarch64_generic/base/packages.adb: unexpected end of file', 'ERROR: unable to select packages:', ' ucert (no such package):', ' required by: world[ucert]'])
.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/labgrid/driver/commandmixin.py:81: ExecutionError

testcase.name: test_lan_interface_has_neighbor

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'DUP!' in 'PING ff02::1%br-lan (ff02::1%4): 56 data bytes
64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=0 ttl=64 time=4.544 ms
64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=1 ttl=64 time=1.752 ms
64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=2 ttl=64 time=1.970 ms

--- ff02::1%br-lan ping statistics ---
3 packets transmitted, 3 packets received, 0% packet loss
round-trip min/avg/max = 1.752/2.755/4.544 ms' + where 'PING ff02::1%br-lan (ff02::1%4): 56 data bytes

64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=2 ttl=64 time=1.970 ms

--- ff02::1%br-lan ping statistics ---
3 packets transmitted, 3 packets received, 0% packet loss
round-trip min/avg/max = 1.752/2.755/4.544 ms' = <built-in method join of str object at 0x15a4408>(['PING ff02::1%br-lan (ff02::1%4): 56 data bytes', '64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=0 ttl=64 time=4.544 ms', '64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=1 ttl=64 time=1.752 ms', '64 bytes from fe80::5054:ff:fe12:3456: seq=2 ttl=64 time=1.970 ms', '', '--- ff02::1%br-lan ping statistics ---', ...]) + where <built-in method join of str object at 0x15a4408> = '
